related.why_it_matters:
It signals continuity in tax policy for capital gains, providing clarity for long-term investment planning.
This affects investor sentiment and portfolio allocation strategies in the Indian equity markets.

related.title: Govt in parliament: There is no proposal currently to scrap #LTCGTax on equities
LTCG tax on equity transactions generated ₹1.29 lakh crore in AY 2025-26, Parliament told
INDIA GOVT. SAYS THERE IS NO PROPOSAL CURRENTLY TO SCRAP LTCG TAX ON EQUITIES; NETS RS 2.01 LKH CR DURING FY24 & FY25 VIA LTCG ON EQUITIES
related.why_it_matters: Provides certainty on the long-term capital gains tax regime, influencing investment decisions. Reveals significant tax revenue generated from equity transactions.

related.title: No proposal currently to scrap LTCG on equities: Govt tells Parliament @Sapna_CNBC https://www.cnbctv18.com/economy/long-term-capital-gains-tax-on-equ...
related.why_it_matters:
The government's clear statement provides regulatory certainty for equity investors, reducing speculation and fostering a stable investment environment.
It helps investors plan their long-term financial strategies without the immediate threat of a major tax policy change.

related.title: Govt Confirms There Will Be No Changes To LTCG Tax on Equities | Latest News
related.why_it_matters: Clarity on Long-Term Capital Gains tax is crucial for long-term investors' financial planning and can influence capital allocation decisions in the Indian equity markets.
